The '''Battle of Ton-Falk''' was an early battle in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought at [[Ton-Falk]].

==The battle==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Arhul Narra/Legends|Narra]] and his droid [[K-3PO/Legends|K-3PO]] devised an ingeniously simple tactic to defeat Imperial forces.<ref name="GG3" /> The Rebel fighters exploited the fact that these ships had to get close to the battle to deploy their [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] squadrons, thus making them vulnerable. The Alliance starfighters ganged up on the larger, slower ships, and subsequently destroyed them.

Two [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], one [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] were destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fighters.<ref name="ISB" /><ref name="GG3" />

==Aftermath==
This Imperial defeat led to the development of [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carriers]].<ref name="ISB" /><ref name="FF" /><ref name="TEGtW" /><ref name="SoT" />

{{Battle-stub}}
